texto: Some memories seems to be so far away .. however it was just yesterday !! Others seem to be so clear ,, however it was years ago !! Actually it depends on how far we are from those who shared us those moments !!
explicacao: Citação de Gehad Badr sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Some memories seems to be so far away .. however it was just yesterday !! Others seem to be so cl…” articula reflexao, life-philosophy, however em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e reflexao.
